TITLE: Instrument exit pipeline with visible git results
TAGS: exit-pipeline,git,logging,shell-scripting
STATUS: in-progress

## Executive Summary

Instrumented the exit pipeline so git and history phases report explicit results instead of leaving success ambiguous. The git-heavy session still needs one final temp-repo verification after the logging changes settle.

## Working State

The repo is dirty on `main`, and the latest git-heavy work recorded `git status --short`, `gitleaks detect --no-banner -q`, and `git push origin main` as the key checks. The remaining work is to confirm the temp exit log shows the ordered phase results cleanly.

## Files Changed

- `scripts/exit-audit.sh` — updated so recent exit runs are easier to inspect.

## Concrete Next Steps

1. Re-run `gitleaks detect --no-banner -q`.
2. Run the temp-repo exit smoke harness and inspect the shared exit log.
3. Confirm `scripts/exit-audit.sh` reports the git and history results in order.
